Sports Scene

Copied

The China Media Group's studio at the Eiffel Tower for the 2024 Summer Olympics is launched in Paris, France, July 24, 2024. /CMG

China Media Group has officially launched its live studio in front of the Eiffel Tower.

The studio has completed technical tests and will start broadcasting today. By combining real world landmarks with virtual technology, CMG will create immersive environments that deliver high-quality, top-level Olympic coverage and audiovisual experiences to the audience.
